name: paper-insight-online
description: Online exam paper analysis MVP with GitHub Pages frontend and Cloudflare Workers backend.

scripts.db:migrate:local: npm --prefix worker exec wrangler d1 migrations apply paper-insight-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npm --prefix worker exec wrangler d1 migrations apply paper-insight-db --remote
scripts.check: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix worker run check
